member.summary: Unit tests for .

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Tests.CampaignRepositoryTests.CanGetCurrentCampaign
member.summary: Returns the default campaign when no time-bound campaign is active.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Tests.CampaignRepositoryTests.GetCurrentCampaignReturnsActiveTimedCampaignOverDefault
member.summary: Prefers a time-bound active campaign over the default campaign.
member.returns: A representing the result of the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Tests.CampaignRepositoryTests.GetCampaignForDateReturnsTimedCampaignForHistoricalDate
member.summary: Resolves the timed campaign that was active on a historical date.
member.returns: A representing the result of the asynchronous operation.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.returns: A representing the result of the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Tests.DonationItemRepositoryTests.GetDonationItemsReturnsEmptyForBlankOrInvalidInput
member.summary: Empty or invalid tokens produce no donation items.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Tests.DonationItemRepositoryTests.CanGetCashDonationItem
member.summary: Builds a single cash donation line from the amount.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Tests.DonationItemRepositoryTests.CanGetDonationItemsForModelException
member.summary: Model-exception parsing returns all catalogue rows with updated quantities.

member.name: T:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Tests.DonationRepositoryEdgeCaseTests
member.summary: Edge-case unit tests for payment completion and notification idempotency.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Tests.DonationRepositoryEdgeCaseTests.#ctor(BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Tests.ServicesFixture)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Tests.DonationRepositoryEdgeCaseTests.CompleteEasyPayPayment_IsIdempotentForCreditCard
member.summary: Completing the same Easypay payment twice keeps the donation paid.
member.returns: A representing the result of the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Tests.DonationRepositoryEdgeCaseTests.UpdatePaymentTransaction_DoesNotDowngradePaidDonationOnFailure
member.summary: Failed generic notifications do not downgrade an already paid donation.
member.returns: A representing the result of the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Tests.DonationRepositoryEdgeCaseTests.CompleteEasyPayPayment_RejectsAmountMismatch
member.summary: Mismatched paid amounts do not mark the donation as paid.
member.returns: A representing the result of the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Tests.DonationRepositoryEdgeCaseTests.UpdatePaymentTransaction_ReturnsZeroForUnknownTransactionKey
member.summary: Unknown transaction keys return zero identifiers without throwing.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Tests.ReferralRepositoryTests.GetByCodeIsCaseInsensitive
member.summary: Referral lookup is case-insensitive.
member.returns: A representing the result of the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Tests.ReferralRepositoryTests.GetActiveCampaignsByCodeReturnsNullWhenInactive
member.summary: Active referral lookup ignores inactive campaigns.
member.returns: A representing the result of the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Tests.ReferralRepositoryTests.CanGetActiveCampaignsByCode
member.summary: Active referral lookup returns active campaigns.
member.returns: A representing the result of the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Tests.ReferralRepositoryTests.CanGetCampaignsByCodeWhenInactive
member.summary: Campaign lookup returns referrals regardless of active flag.
member.returns: A representing the result of the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Tests.ReferralRepositoryTests.CanUpdateState
member.summary: Updates referral active state in the database.
member.returns: A representing the result of the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Tests.ReferralRepositoryTests.CanGetPaidDonationsByReferralCode
member.summary: Returns only paid donations for the referral code.
member.returns: A representing the result of the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Tests.ReferralRepositoryTests.GetPaidDonationsByReferralCode_ReturnsNullForUnknownCode
member.summary: Returns null when the referral code does not exist.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Tests.ReferralRepositoryTests.CanGetUserReferrals
member.summary: Returns all referrals owned by the user.
member.returns: A representing the result of the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Tests.ReferralRepositoryTests.CanGetTopList
member.summary: Top list ranks active referrals by paid donation totals within the evaluation window.
member.returns: A representing the result of the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Tests.ReferralRepositoryTests.CanGetFullReferral
member.summary: Loads referral with donations for the owning user.
member.returns: A representing the result of the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Tests.ReferralRepositoryTests.GetFullReferralReturnsNullForWrongUser
member.summary: GetFullReferral returns null when the referral belongs to another user.
member.returns: A representing the result of the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Tests.ReferralRepositoryTests.GetByCodeWithUserIdReturnsOnlyOwnedReferral
member.summary: GetByCode with user id scopes lookup to that owner's campaigns.
member.returns: A representing the result of the asynchronous operation.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Marks subscription active when easypay reports success.
member.returns: A representing the result of the asynchronous operation.

member.summary: Marks subscription in error when easypay reports failure.
member.returns: A representing the result of the asynchronous operation.

member.summary: Unknown transaction keys return -1.

member.summary: Creates a subscription linked to the initial donation.
member.returns: A representing the result of the asynchronous operation.

member.summary: Skips subscription creation when required fields are missing.
member.returns: A representing the result of the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Tests.SubscriptionRepositoryTests.GetUserSubscription_ReturnsNullForNullUser
member.summary: Returns null when the user argument is null.

member.summary: Returns subscriptions for a user excluding created-only rows.
member.returns: A representing the result of the asynchronous operation.

member.summary: Resolves subscription from initial donation id.
member.returns: A representing the result of the asynchronous operation.

member.summary: Soft-deletes a subscription and marks it inactive.
member.returns: A representing the result of the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Tests.SubscriptionRepositoryTests.CanNotDeleteUnknownSubscription
member.summary: Delete returns false for unknown subscription ids.

member.summary: Finds subscription by public id.
member.returns: A representing the result of the asynchronous operation.

member.summary: Finds subscription by primary key with user and initial donation loaded.
member.returns: A representing the result of the asynchronous operation.

member.summary: Finds subscription by easypay subscription id.
member.returns: A representing the result of the asynchronous operation.

member.summary: Lists donations linked to a subscription.
member.returns: A representing the result of the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Tests.SubscriptionRepositoryTests.CanGetDonationFromSubscriptionTransactionKey
member.summary: Finds a donation for a subscription transaction key on a given date.
member.returns: A representing the result of the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Tests.SubscriptionRepositoryTests.CanCreateSubscriptionDonationAndPayment
member.summary: Creates a new donation and payment when capture date differs from the initial donation date.
member.returns: A representing the result of the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Tests.SubscriptionRepositoryTests.CanSubscriptionCaptureExistingPayment
member.summary: Returns an existing capture payment donation id when dates differ.
member.returns: A representing the result of the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Tests.SubscriptionRepositoryTests.CanSyncSubscriptionFromEasyPayWhenExpired
member.summary: Marks subscription inactive when Easypay reports an expired subscription.
member.returns: A representing the result of the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Tests.SubscriptionRepositoryTests.CanSyncSubscriptionFromEasyPayWhenActive
member.summary: Updates subscription dates from Easypay when still active.
member.returns: A representing the result of the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Tests.SubscriptionRepositoryTests.SyncSubscriptionFromEasyPay_DoesNotCallApiWhenUserHasOnlyCreatedSubscriptions
member.summary: Skips Easypay API calls when the user only has created subscriptions.
member.returns: A representing the result of the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Tests.SubscriptionRepositoryTests.SyncSubscriptionFromEasyPay_SkipsSubscriptionWhenApiReturnsNull
member.summary: Leaves subscription unchanged when Easypay returns no subscription payload.
member.returns: A representing the result of the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Tests.SubscriptionRepositoryTests.SubscriptionCaptureReturnsPaymentDateEqualWhenSameDayAsInitialDonation
member.summary: Returns payment-date-equal reason when capture date matches the initial donation date.
member.returns: A representing the result of the asynchronous operation.

member.name: M:BancoAlimentar.AlimentaEstaIdeia.Repository.Tests.SubscriptionRepositoryTests.SubscriptionCaptureReturnsNotFoundForUnknownKey
member.summary: Returns not found when subscription transaction key is unknown.
